back_translation: Every word that I am commanding you, that you shall keep to do; you shall not add to it and you shall not diminish from it.
If there arises in your midst a prophet or a dreamer of a dream, and he gives to you a sign or a wonder,
and the sign and the wonder that he spoke to you comes about, saying: Let us go after other gods that you have not known, and let us serve them,

you shall not listen to the words of that prophet or to that dreamer of the dream, for the Lord your God is testing you to know whether you are loving the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul.
After the Lord your God you shall walk, and Him you shall fear, and His commandments you shall keep, and His voice you shall listen to, and Him you shall serve, and to Him you shall cling.

And that prophet or that dreamer of the dream shall be put to death, for he has spoken rebellion against the Lord your God, who brought you out from the land of Egypt and who redeemed you from the house of slaves, to entice you from the way that the Lord your God commanded you to walk in. And you shall purge the evil from your midst.

If your brother, son of your mother, or your son or your daughter or the wife of your bosom or your friend who is as your own soul entices you secretly, saying: Let us go and serve other gods that you have not known, you and your fathers,
from the gods of the peoples that are around you, those near to you or those far from you, from one end of the earth and to the other end of the earth,
you shall not yield to him, and you shall not listen to him, and your eye shall not pity him, and you shall not spare, and you shall not conceal him.
But killing you shall kill him; your hand shall be against him first to put him to death, and the hand of all the people last.
And you shall stone him with stones and he shall die, for he sought to entice you from the Lord your God who brought you out from the land of Egypt, from the house of slaves.
And all Israel will hear and fear, and they will not continue to do according to this evil thing in your midst.
When you hear in one of your cities that the Lord your God is giving to you to dwell there, saying:
Men have gone out, sons of Belial, from your midst, and have enticed the inhabitants of their city, saying: Let us go and serve other gods that you have not known,
then you shall inquire and investigate and ask thoroughly, and behold, truth, established the matter, this abomination was done in your midst,
striking you shall strike the inhabitants of that city with the edge of the sword. Devote to destruction it and all that is in it and its cattle with the edge of the sword.

And all its plunder you shall gather into the midst of its square, and you shall burn in the fire the city and all its plunder, wholly to the Lord your God; and it shall be a mound forever, it shall not be built again.

And nothing of the devoted thing shall cling in your hand, so that the Lord may turn from the fierceness of His anger, and give to you mercy, and have compassion on you, and multiply you, as He swore to your fathers.
When you listen to the voice of the Lord your God, to keep all His commandments that I am commanding you today, to do what is right in the eyes of the Lord your God.
